name: doc_search
description:
Search the unstructured document knowledge base (hybrid semantic + keyword retrieval). Pass one or more search requests in a single call; results are de-duplicated by chunk across the batch and returned as chunks with a relevance score, the source doc_id, and (for paginated sources) a page number.

Each request may include an optional metadata filter to scope the search to a subset of documents. Filterable metadata keys: domain (string), doc_type (string), num_pages (number), doc_id (string). Use structured_search first if you need to discover the available values. Supported operators include equals, notEquals, in, notIn, greaterThan, greaterThanOrEquals, lessThan, lessThanOrEquals, startsWith, stringContains, listContains, and andAll/orAll to combine them.

Examples of filters: {"equals": {"key": "domain", "value": "legal"}}; {"in": {"key": "domain", "value": ["legal", "education"]}}; {"andAll": [{"equals": {"key": "doc_type", "value": "report"}}, {"greaterThan": {"key": "num_pages", "value": 20}}]}.

search_requests.description: One or more search requests to run in a single batch.

filter.description: Optional Bedrock metadata filter to scope this query (see operators above).

numberOfResults.description: Maximum chunks per query (optional, default 10, max 25).
